reviews.comment:
No tiene lo de todas las ypf, te venden su comida, malisima y cara

(Translated by Google)
It doesn't have what all the YPF stations have; they sell you their food, which is terrible and expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbnFDamJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Quiero agradecer al chico q me cargo $500 de nafta hoy 20/07/18 al rededor de las 11 de la noche...fui desde merlo hasta san pedro y en el trayecto me baje un momento del auto y perdi la billetera me tuve q volver a merlo (230 km), No se si lo leas pero muchisimas gracias! Me super salvaste! Todavia hay gente buena...como la q me cruze tmb en el camino graciaasss

(Translated by Google)
I want to thank the guy who gave me $500 worth of gas today, July 20, 2018, around 11 PM. I was driving from Merlo to San Pedro, and on the way, I got out of the car for a moment and lost my wallet. I had to go back to Merlo (230 km). I don't know if you'll read this, but thank you so much! You really saved me! There are still good people out there... like the ones I met along the way. Thanks!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bDVYNExREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Gran estación. Buen desayunado camino a Córdoba. Baño limpísimo y hasta tecnológico. Café con leche y el bizcocho la rompe!

(Translated by Google)
Great station. Good breakfast on the way to Córdoba. Spotlessly clean and even high-tech bathroom. The coffee with milk and the cake were amazing!
